During our recent review of Oceanic Logistics' routing efficiency metrics, we identified a persistent pattern of systemic de-prioritization regarding transit hubs in Sub-Saharan Africa and Southeast Asian developing corridors. Your logs categorize these as "high-instability nodes," but our analysis suggests this is an algorithmic bias that creates significant economic exclusion.

This will override your current optimization parameters to ensure equitable resource distribution across all global emerging markets, regardless of local "stability" scores. Please provide a technical impact assessment regarding the integration of this patch into your current weights.
